paper.title: The origin of early-type runaway stars from open clusters

source_ref.caption: P-values corresponding to different significance levels for 1 and 8 parameters using the $\chi^2$ distribution when all parameters are at the respective ends of the uncertainty.
source_ref.label: tab:significance

source_ref.caption: Radius containing 50\% of the member stars of new clusters reported in this paper.
source_ref.label: tab:extentofclusters

source_ref.caption: P values for the three-dimensional runaway samples of \citetads{2020MNRAS.495.3104S} and \citetads{Farias_orion}, thought to come from the ONC.
source_ref.label: tab:schoetller

source_ref.caption: Radial velocities v$_\textrm{rad}$ and derived space velocities v$_\textrm{s}$ for the sample of \citetads{hoog}.
source_ref.label: tab:spacevelocity

source_ref.caption: Suggested Clusters as places of origin for runaway stars based on spatial coincidence.
source_ref.label: tab:identification

source_ref.caption: Possible Clusters as sites of origin of the Halo runaway stars using spatial coincidence.
source_ref.label: tab:haloidenfication

source_ref.caption: Parameters of runaways from the \citetads{hoog} sample. \textit{Hipparcos}, \textit{Gaia} DR2 \citepads{2018A&A...616A...2L} and EDR3 \citepads{2021A&A...649A...2L} astrometric data are given.
source_ref.label: tab:hypervelparams

source_ref.caption: Kinematic parameters of B type runaways in the Galactic halo taken from \citeads{Markus:Thesis:2021}
source_ref.label: tab:hyperrun

source_ref.caption: P values for the list of stars in the sample of \citetads{hoog}. The column p-val lists the p-values and the column T$_f$ lists the best fit times of flight for the \textit{Hipparcos} astrometry.
source_ref.label: tab:table1

source_ref.caption: P values for the previously known single and binary stars in the sample of \citetads{hoog} with \textit{Gaia} DR2 \citepads{2018A&A...616A...2L} and EDR3 \citepads{2021A&A...649A...2L} astrometries.
source_ref.label: tab:oldtars
